seoBlock.title: AI Music Generator for Creators
seoBlock.p1: Calyra AI is an AI song generator and AI music generator designed to help creators turn prompts, lyrics, and song ideas into complete tracks. Instead of starting from a blank music project, you can describe the sound you want, choose a style, and generate music with vocals and instruments. Use Calyra AI as an AI song maker when you have a simple idea, a text to song AI tool when you want to describe a mood, or a lyrics to song AI workflow when you already have words.
seoBlock.p2: Popular use cases include AI rap songs, anime openings, phonk tracks, lo-fi background music, EDM drops, emotional piano ballads, and pop songs for social content. Creators can make AI songs for YouTube videos, TikTok, Shorts, podcasts, games, ads, and personal creative projects. Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially, subject to our terms.

faq.title: Questions Before You Generate
faq.q1: What is an AI song generator?
faq.a1: An AI song generator creates songs from prompts, lyrics, moods, and style descriptions. Calyra AI helps you generate music with vocals and instruments without traditional production skills.
faq.q2: How do I make a song with AI?
faq.a2: Enter a prompt that describes the genre, mood, story, lyrics, vocal style, and use case. You can also start from a template or use a song example as inspiration.
faq.q3: Can I turn lyrics into a song with AI?
faq.a3: Yes. Paste your lyrics and describe the arrangement, tempo, mood, and vocal direction. Calyra AI can help turn lyrics into a song direction with vocals and instruments.
faq.q4: Is Calyra AI a free AI song maker?
faq.a4: You can start testing song ideas for free. More generations, monthly song credits, downloads, and commercial use rights are available through paid plans or one-time credit packs.
faq.q5: Can I use AI-generated songs commercially?
faq.a5: Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially for content, commercial projects, and music distribution, subject to the latest terms.
faq.q6: Can I generate songs with vocals?
faq.a6: Yes. Calyra AI is positioned for full song generation, including vocal-style songs and instrumental arrangements depending on the prompt and generation mode.
faq.q7: Can I create music for YouTube or TikTok?
faq.a7: Yes. You can generate hooks, background music, intros, theme songs, and full songs for YouTube, TikTok, Shorts, podcasts, and social media content.

faq.title: Preguntas frecuentes
faq.q1: Cuantos creditos cuesta generar canciones? Vale la pena?
faq.a1: Cada generacion consume 200 creditos y devuelve 2 canciones. Es decir, un promedio de 100 creditos por cancion para comparar versiones y elegir la mejor mas rapido.
faq.q2: Es seguro pagar? Me preocupa el riesgo de pago.
faq.a2: Totalmente. Usamos canales de pago principales con cifrado de nivel bancario y controles de riesgo. Tus datos de pago se procesan directamente en la plataforma de pago y no podemos ver ni guardar tu informacion completa de pago.
faq.q3: Como funciona la suscripcion? Se renueva automaticamente?
faq.a3: Tenemos dos planes: Basic y Pro, con pago mensual o anual. El plan mensual se renueva cada mes, el anual cada ano, y el primer cobro se realiza el dia de la compra.
faq.q4: Que derechos de uso/comerciales obtengo al suscribirme?
faq.a4: Los suscriptores pueden descargar todas las canciones generadas y obtienen derechos completos de uso comercial, incluidos publicacion de contenido, proyectos comerciales y distribucion en plataformas musicales.
faq.q5: Cuantas generaciones gratis reciben los usuarios gratuitos al dia?
faq.a5: Cada 24 horas tienes 1-2 generaciones gratis, con salida total de 2-4 canciones. Se usa una ventana movil: cuando agotas tus usos, el siguiente reinicio se calcula desde ese momento exacto.
faq.q6: Cuanto tiempo se guardan las canciones? Se borran?
faq.a6: Regla actual: las canciones de usuarios gratuitos se guardan 30 dias. Las canciones generadas durante una suscripcion Basic o Pro activa se conservan a largo plazo. Si necesitas archivo de largo plazo, te conviene un plan superior.

pricingPage.subscribeNowCancelAnytime: Suscribete ahora - cancela en cualquier momento.

common.contactBody: For questions about these policies or your account, contact support at support@calyraai.com or through your dashboard support channel.

seo.title: Privacy Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: How Calyra AI collects, uses, and protects personal data for account, payment, and AI song creation workflows.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This policy explains what data Calyra AI handles, why we handle it, and the choices you have.

sections.title: Data we collect
body: We collect account identifiers such as email and authentication data, song creation inputs such as stories and prompts, generation outputs such as lyrics and audio metadata, and billing records needed to process purchases.
bullets: Account data: email, auth provider identifiers, profile basics
Creation data: story text, style selections, generated lyrics/audio references
Usage data: logs, device/browser metadata, anti-abuse signals
Billing data: transaction references from payment processors

sections.title: How we use data
body: We use data to operate core product flows, deliver purchased services, prevent abuse, improve reliability, and communicate important account or policy updates.
bullets: Run lyric, audio, and report generation workflows
Store and serve your songs and public share pages
Process credits, subscriptions, and refunds
Investigate incidents and maintain security

sections.title: Third-party services
body: Calyra AI relies on selected infrastructure and model providers to deliver the service. These providers process only the data required for their function under applicable agreements.
bullets: Hosting and database services
Payment processing services
Email and notification services
AI generation providers for lyrics, audio, and analysis

sections.title: Retention and your choices
body: We retain data for as long as needed to provide the service, meet legal obligations, and resolve disputes. You can request deletion of your account data subject to operational and legal constraints.
bullets: You may delete songs and account data from product surfaces where available
Backups and legal records may persist for limited periods
Public song pages remain public until you change visibility or remove them

seo.title: Terms of Service | Calyra AI
seo.description: Terms governing use of Calyra AI, including account responsibilities, generated content, credits, subscriptions, and limitations.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: By using Calyra AI, you agree to these terms for account access, AI generation, and paid features.

sections.title: Service scope
body: Calyra AI provides tools to transform user prompts into lyrics, audio, and creator-style reports. Features can change over time and may vary by plan or region.

sections.title: Accounts and acceptable use
body: You are responsible for activity under your account and for complying with law and platform policies.
bullets: Do not misuse the service, attempt unauthorized access, or automate abuse
Do not upload unlawful, infringing, or harmful content
Keep account credentials secure and accurate

sections.title: Content and intellectual property
body: You retain rights to the inputs you submit. Subject to applicable law and these terms, you may use outputs generated for your account. Calyra AI and its licensors retain rights in the platform, models, and infrastructure.

sections.title: Payments, credits, and refunds
body: Paid features include credit packs and subscriptions. Charges are processed by our payment providers. Refund eligibility is governed by our Refund Policy.
bullets: Credits are consumed by eligible generation actions
Subscription access and benefits follow the active billing period
Refund requests are reviewed under stated policy conditions

sections.title: Disclaimers and limitation
body: The service is provided on an as-available basis. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or specific creative outcomes. To the maximum extent permitted by law, liability is limited to amounts paid for the relevant service period.

seo.title: Refund Policy | Calyra AI
seo.description: Refund eligibility, timelines, and process for Calyra AI credit purchases and subscriptions.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: This policy explains when refunds are available and how to request one.

sections.title: Eligibility
body: Refunds are available for unused credits requested within 7 days of purchase.
bullets: Request must be submitted within 7 calendar days
Credits tied to the request must be unused
The purchase must be made through an official Calyra AI checkout flow

sections.title: Non-refundable cases
body: Refunds are generally not available for credits that have been used, expired windows, or abuse-related account restrictions.
bullets: Partially or fully consumed credits
Requests beyond the 7-day window
Fraud, chargeback abuse, or policy violations

sections.title: How to request a refund
body: Contact support with your account email, order identifier, and reason for the request. We may ask for additional verification to protect account security.
bullets: Include order ID and purchase date
Use the same account email used for purchase
Allow support time to verify credit usage status

sections.title: Processing timeline
body: Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method. Processing time depends on your payment provider and card network.
bullets: Policy review: typically within 3 business days
Payment reversal: usually 5-10 business days after approval

seo.title: Text to Song AI - Create Songs from Prompts | Calyra AI
seo.description: Turn text prompts, moods, stories, and ideas into AI songs with vocals and instruments. Start a text to song workflow with Calyra AI.

hero.title: Turn Text Into a Complete AI Song
hero.description: Describe a mood, story, genre, vocal style, or use case, then continue into the Calyra AI song workspace with the right mode already selected.

form.placeholder: Describe the song you want: mood, story, genre, vocal tone, audience, and where you will use it.
form.stylePlaceholder: Pop, emotional female vocal, cinematic drums
form.styleDefault: Pop, emotional female vocal, cinematic drums
form.title: Title

benefits.title: A Faster Way to Start a Song
benefits.description: Text to song is best when you have a feeling, scene, or content idea but do not have finished lyrics yet.

ideas.title: Start from any idea
ideas.description: Use a short prompt, story, mood, or content brief as the seed for a full song direction.

vocals.title: Shape vocals and instruments
vocals.description: Guide genre, tempo, singer energy, arrangement, and production style before generation.

creators.title: Built for creator use cases
creators.description: Make songs for YouTube, TikTok, podcasts, games, ads, and social media concepts.

steps.title: How Text to Song Works
steps.description: Move from a plain-language prompt to a generated song without opening a music production tool.

prompt.title: Write a clear prompt
prompt.description: Describe the emotion, story, audience, genre, and vocal direction you want.

style.title: Add style guidance
style.description: Pick a style so the generator understands the sound and arrangement you are aiming for.

create.title: Generate the song
create.description: Continue to the workspace, review the setup, and generate lyrics plus audio.

one.question: What is text to song AI?
one.answer: Text to song AI turns a written prompt into a song direction, lyrics, and generated music with vocals and instruments.

two.question: Do I need finished lyrics?
two.answer: No. Use this mode when you only have an idea, story, mood, or content brief.

three.question: Can I choose the music style?
three.answer: Yes. Add genre, mood, vocal, tempo, and instrument details to guide the result.

four.question: Can I use the song commercially?
four.answer: Subscribers can download generated songs and use them commercially, subject to the latest terms.

finalCta.title: Ready to Turn an Idea Into Music?
finalCta.description: Start with a clear text prompt and continue into the Calyra AI song workspace.

seo.title: Lyrics to Song AI - Turn Lyrics Into Music | Calyra AI
seo.description: Paste your lyrics and turn them into an AI song with vocals, instruments, arrangement, and style direction using Calyra AI.

hero.title: Turn Your Lyrics Into a Full AI Song
hero.description: Bring existing lyrics, add arrangement and vocal direction, then continue into the song workspace with Lyrics to Song mode selected.

form.placeholder: Paste your lyrics, then add any notes about emotion, chorus energy, vocal tone, or arrangement.
form.stylePlaceholder: Piano ballad, soft male vocal, cinematic strings
form.styleDefault: Piano ballad, emotional vocal, cinematic strings
form.title: Title

benefits.title: Keep Your Words, Add the Music
benefits.description: Lyrics to song is best when you already have the words and want AI to help with performance and production.

lyrics.title: Use your own lyrics
lyrics.description: Paste verses, hooks, choruses, or rough drafts and keep the song centered on your writing.

arrangement.title: Guide the arrangement
arrangement.description: Add direction for instruments, tempo, vocal style, mood, and chorus lift.

control.title: Stay in the workflow
control.description: Move from lyrics to audio generation without switching tools or rebuilding the prompt.

steps.title: How Lyrics to Song Works
steps.description: Use your lyrics as the foundation, then let the generator create the musical setting around them.

paste.title: Paste your lyrics
paste.description: Add the words you want to turn into a song, including sections if you already have them.

direct.title: Direct the sound
direct.description: Describe the genre, vocal tone, emotional arc, and instrumentation.

create.title: Generate music
create.description: Continue to the workspace and create the audio version of your lyrics.

one.question: Can AI turn my lyrics into a song?
one.answer: Yes. Paste your lyrics and add style direction so Calyra AI can generate a song with vocals and instruments.

two.question: Do my lyrics need to be finished?
two.answer: Finished lyrics help, but you can also paste a rough draft and include notes for the intended structure.

three.question: Can I choose a vocal style?
three.answer: Yes. Add vocal tone, gender direction, energy, language, and arrangement notes in the style field.

four.question: What happens after I submit?
four.answer: You continue to the song workspace with Lyrics to Song mode selected so you can generate the track.

finalCta.title: Have Lyrics Ready?
finalCta.description: Paste them into the Lyrics to Song workflow and shape the music around your words.

seo.title: AI Lyrics Generator - Write Song Lyrics Online | Calyra AI
seo.description: Generate song lyrics from a theme, story, mood, or title. Use Calyra AI to draft lyrics, then turn them into a complete song.

hero.title: Generate Lyrics Before You Make the Song
hero.description: Write a lyric draft from a theme, story, or emotion, then continue directly into the song generator when the words feel right.

form.placeholder: Describe the story, emotion, theme, perspective, hook idea, or audience for the lyrics.
form.title: Title seed
form.signInDescription: Calyra saves lyric drafts to your account so you can turn them into songs later.

benefits.title: Write Better Song Seeds
benefits.description: Use the lyrics generator when you need words first, then bring the draft into the music workflow.

draft.title: Draft from a theme
draft.description: Start with a story, feeling, title, or hook idea and generate a structured lyric draft.

structure.title: Get song-ready sections
structure.description: Create lyrics with verses, chorus ideas, emotional progression, and a clear center.

nextStep.title: Continue into music
nextStep.description: Use the saved draft as the starting point for Lyrics to Song generation.

steps.title: How the AI Lyrics Generator Works
steps.description: Create a lyric draft first, then decide whether to keep editing or generate music.

brief.title: Describe the lyric idea
brief.description: Give the generator a theme, story, mood, point of view, and style.

review.title: Review the draft
review.description: Read the generated lyrics and keep the parts that match your song.

song.title: Turn it into a song
song.description: Continue to the song workspace and generate audio from the saved lyrics.

one.question: What can I generate lyrics from?
one.answer: You can start from a title, theme, story, emotion, genre, hook idea, or short creative brief.

two.question: Can I turn the lyrics into music?
two.answer: Yes. After generating lyrics, use the Turn Into Song action to continue into the song workspace.

three.question: Do I need to sign in?
three.answer: Yes. Lyrics are saved as drafts so you can return to them and generate audio later.

four.question: Can I edit the lyrics?
four.answer: You can review and edit the draft in the next workflow before creating the final song.

finalCta.title: Want Music for These Lyrics?
finalCta.description: Generate a lyric draft now, then turn it into a full song when you are ready.
